name: Glumgold's Sea [ INDEX ]

desc:
The sea is calm near the shore, and it spreads out as far west as your eyes
can see.  The sand beneath your feet is moist, perfect for making a sand castle
if you wanted to.  To the east, there is a path that rims the shore around this
part of the sea.

exits.desc: The sea is all that you see to the west.

name: Near the Shore

desc:
The sea spreads out as far as you can see to the west, but land is in plain
sight north and east.  However, reefs, trees, and dense seaweed make it
impossible to reach the shore from here.

exits.desc: You see land to the north, but you cannot climb up on the shore from here.
You see land to the east, but you cannot climb up on the shore from here.
Rippling water is all that you see to the south.
Rippling water is all that you see to the west.

name: The Sea

desc:
The sea spreads out as far as you can see to the west, but land is in sight
north, south, and east.  However, reefs, trees, and dense seaweed make it
impossible to reach the shore from here.

exits.desc: You can see land to the north.
There is land to the east, but you cannot climb on to the shore from here.
Rippling water is all that you see to the south.
Rippling water is all that you can see to the west.

name: The Sea

desc:
The sea spreads out as far as you can see to the west, but land is in plain
sight north and east.  However, reefs, trees, and dense seaweed make it
impossible to reach the shore from here.

exits.desc: You can see land to the north.
There is land to the east, but you cannot climb up on the shore from here.
You can barely see land far to the south.
Rippling water is all that you see to the west.

name: The Sea

desc:
The sea spreads out as far as you can see to the west, but land is in plain
sight north and east.  There is a clear and seemingly safe path to the shore
due east.

exits.desc: Rippling water is all you see to the north.
To the east, you see the shore.
Rippling water is all you see to the south.
Rippling water is all that you see to the west.

name: The Sea

desc:
The sea spreads out as far as you can see to the west, but land is in plain
sight north and east.  However, reefs, trees, and dense seaweed make it

exits.desc: Rippling water is all that you see to the north.
To the east you see land, but you cannot climb up on the shore from here.
Rippling water is all that you see to the south.
Rippling water is all that you see to the west.

name: The Sea

desc:
The sea spreads out as far as you can see to the west, but land is in plain

exits.desc: Rippling water is all that you see to the north.

Rippling water is all that you see to the south.
Rippling water is all that you see to the west.

name: The Sea

desc:
The sea spreads out as far as you can see to the south and west, but land is
in plain sight north and east.  However, reefs, trees, and dense seaweed make
it impossible to reach the shore from here.

exits.desc: Rippling water is all that you see to the north.
To the east, you see land, but you cannot climb up on the shore from here.
Rippling water is all that you see to the south.
Rippling water is all that you see to the west.

name: The Sea

desc:
The crystal clear waters spread out as far as your eyes can carry your
sight.  To the east, shore is just barely in sight.  Both to the north and
south, nothing but water and sky can be seen except for the faint outline of
the shore bordering the sea just under the horizon.  Below you, the deep blue
sea looks very deep and formidable.  Not recommended for swimmers.

exits.desc: Rippling water is all that you see to the north.
To the east you see land, but you cannot climb up to the shore from here.
Rippling water is all that you see to the south.
Rippling water is all that you see to the west.

name: The Sea

desc:
All around you, in every direction, you see nothing but the sea.  Even if
the water seems peaceful, there is still danger lurking behind every wave.
Below you, the water is a dark blue, indicating that it is very deep and
extremely dangerous.

You see a small island to the south.

name: Near a Small Island

desc:
You tie your boat up near the shore and explore the island a bit.  Most of
the island is covered with a dense forrest.  Though it is very small, no more
than a few hundred meters wide, there is a small hut almost in the direct
center.  The hut is suspended about 3 meters from the ground by some wooden
poles of some sort, the only means of entrance being the rope ladder hanging
down from a hole in the center.

exits.desc: Rippling water spreads out as far as you can see in every direction.
Rippling water spreads out as far as you can see in every direction.
Rippling water spreads out as far as you can see in every direction.
Rippling water spreads out as far as you can see in every direction.
There is a small hutt above your head.

name: On a Small Island

desc:
All around you, in every direction, you see nothing but the sea.  Even if
the water seems peaceful, there is still danger lurking behind every wave.
Below you, the water is a dark blue, indicating that it is very deep and
extremely dangerous.

exits.desc: You see a small island to the north.

the water seems peaceful, there is still danger lurking behind every wave.
Below you, the water is a dark blue, indicating that it is very deep and
extremely dangerous.

exits.desc: Rippling water is all that you can see in every direction.
Rippling water is all that you can see in every direction.
Rippling water is all that you can see in every direction.
Rippling water is all that you can see in every direction.

name: The Sea

desc:
All around you, in every direction, you see nothing but the sea.  Even if
the water seems peaceful, there is still danger lurking behind every wave.
Below you, the water is a dark blue, indicating that it is very deep and
extremely dangerous.

exits.desc: Rippling water is all that you can see to the north.
Rippling water is all that you can see to the east.
Rippling water is all that you can see to the south.
You see a small island to the west.

Rippling water is all that you can see in every direction.

name: The Sea

desc:
You are standing on the bow of the ship, gazing over the railing at the
rippling water.  There is a large wheel here, obviously used to steer the
vessel.

exits.desc: The Fore Deck is just south of here.

name: The Bow of a Pirate's Ship

desc:
The edge of the boat here has no railing, and there is a rope ladder leading
down to the water.  This could possibly be the only way off the boat, aside
from walking the plank...

exits.desc:
The ladder extends down to the surface of the water, allowing you to board
the boat on this side also.

name: The Starboard Side of the Boat

desc:
You are standing on the fore deck of the ship.  High above you, the crow's
nest sits atop the mast.  All around you, the sea spreads out as far as your
eyes can see.  East of here is a wooden plank extending past the side of the
boat.  To the west, is a life boat ready to be dropped into the water.

exits.desc: The bow of the ship is north of here.
A lifeboat hangs from the port side of the boat.
There is a door to the south.
A long plank extends from the starboard side of the boat.
The crow's nest sits high atop the mast.

name: The Fore Deck of a Pirate's Ship

desc:
A wooden plank, barely half a meter wide, is all that is holding you from
falling into the churning sea below.  The salty air nearly blows you over to
your doom.  The old board creeks beneath your weight...

exits.desc:
The water is ice cold and would pretty much mean instant death if you were
to fall in...

extra_descs.desc:
The old wooden plank is full of cracks and is swaying very uneasily under
your weight.

name: Walking the Plank...

desc:
The Captain's room is lavishly decorated.  Expensive-looking curtains hang
from the windows, the rugs on the floor are top quality, and the furniture is
exquisite.

exits.desc: The Captain's Quarters extend to the south.
The doorway to the west leads back to the hallway.

name: The Captain's Quarters

desc:
You are standing in a hallway.  To the east is a door, it appears to lead to
the Captain's room.  To the west is a door with something written on it.
North, there is a door that leads out on the deck.  South, the hallway
continues.

exits.desc: The door to the north leads to the deck.
The Captain's quarters are to the east.
The hallway continues south to some more doorways.
There is a door marked '@oGALLEY@n' to the west.

name: Inside a Pirate's Ship

desc:
You are in the galley of the ship.  This is where all the food and
provisions are kept during a voyage.  The walls of the room are covered with
shelves of food, supplies, and the like.  A few chests are also scattered about
the room.
name: The Galley

desc:
This side of the captain's room is where his bed sits.  The bed looks very
comfortable, and very expensive.  Oil paintings hang on the wall, showing
various famous figures, as well as some figures you don't recognize.

exits.desc: The Captain's Quarters extend to the north.

name: The Captain's Quarters

desc:
You are standing in a hallway.  To the west there is an unmarked door, to
the south is the stern of the ship, and the hallway continues north towards the
bow.

exits.desc: The hallway continues north toward the bow.
There is an unmarked door to the west.

name: Inside a Pirate's Ship

desc:
This room is filled mainly with a wide stairway spiraling down to a lower
deck.  To the north is a door leading to what appears to be the galley, and the
door to the east leads into a hallway.

exits.desc: The ship's galley is north of here.
The doorway to the east leads into the upper hallway.
A stairway leads down below deck.

name: Near a Stairway

desc:
You are mid-deck in a large ship, close to the bow.  This deck is used as
the main dining hall as well as the bar, dance floor, and sometimes as a bed.
To the north, west and east, the deck spreads out more.  There is a small
stairway leading down from here.  There is another stairway leading up to the
top deck.

exits.desc: This large room extends to the north.
This large room extends to the west.
A stairway leads up to the top deck.
A small stairway leads down to the brig.

name: The Mid-Deck

desc:
You are standing in the crow's nest near the top of the largest mast on the
boat.  You can see for many miles in every direction, but you see nothing but
water, water, and more water.  The ladder leading back to the deck is the only
way out of here, unless you wanted to jump...

exits.desc: You have a wonderful view of the ocean from up here.  You see nothing but water to the north.
You have a wonderful view of the ocean from up here.  You see land far to the east.
You have a wonderful view of the ocean from up here.  You see nothing but water to the south.
You have a wonderful view of the ocean from up here.  You see nothing but water to the west.

The Jolly Roger flies from a flagpole just above your head, warning other
ships that this vessel is not to be messed with.
The deck of the ship is far below you.  You could @ojump@n down, but it is not recommended...

extra_descs.desc:

   MMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMM@n


   @gSome believe the Jolly Roger gets its name from the French
   "Jolie Rouge" or "Red Flag."  The flag was first used by a
   French order of militant monks known as the "Poor Soldiers
   of Christ and the Temple of Solomon" -- commonly known as
   "The Knights Templar."

   Just as a terrorist to one is a freedom fighter to another,
   so it was with the Templars and their fleet. Wanted by the
   Pope and all the crowns of Europe, they came to be viewed,
   by the folks on the mainland, as pirates.

   For more history of the Jolly Roger,
   visit@n http://www.skullandcrossbones.org

name: The Crow's Nest
@bDavy Jones' Locker@n

desc:
You are mid-deck in a large ship, close to the bow.  This deck is used as
the main dining hall as well as the bar, dance floor, and sometimes as a bed.
To the south and west, the deck spreads out more.

exits.desc: This large room extends to the south.
This large room extends to the west.

name: The Mid-Deck

desc:
You find that this cell, much like any jail cell, appears very...  VERY
small from the inside; even more so when the iron door is locking you from the
relative freedom of the rest of the ship.  The north, east, and west walls of
the cell are lined on the outside with slabs of rock and wooden slats.
Outside of the iron bars to the south is the rest of the filthy brig.

exits.desc: The south door is the only exit from this cell.

name: A Cramped Cell

desc:
You are mid-deck in a large ship, close to the bow.  This deck is used as
the main dining hall as well as the bar, dance floor, and sometimes as a bed.
To the south and east, the deck spreads out more.  There appears to be some
sort of hatch on the floor.

exits.desc: This large room extends to the east.
This large room extends to the south.
The hatch has a small, steel lock on it.

name: The Mid-Deck

desc:
Looking about the room you're in, it's easy to tell that the pirates don't
intend for prisoners to enjoy their stays here.  The walls are unpainted and
uncovered; the bare, rotting boards show through clearly.  A single cell north
of here takes up most of the brig.

exits.desc: There is a prison cell north of here.
A small stairway leads up to the mid-deck.

name: The Brig

desc:
This is it, the mother load of the pirate ship.  This room is where
everything the pirates loot or steal ends up.  Needless to say, the pirates
wouldn't be very happy to find you sneaking around in here...

exits.desc: A ladder leads back to the mid-deck.

name: The Treasury

desc:
You are in the middle of a small hut.  The walls are made of something
similar to bamboo, tied together with small vines.  The only furniture in the
hut is a small bed, a table, and a stove.

exits.desc: A ladder leads back down to the beach.

name: A Small Hutt

desc:
You are standing near the stern of a fishing boat as it cruises down the
river.  Tiny bones and fish scales litter the floor of this boat, making faint
crunching noises as you walk about.

exits.desc: A large flap of canvas separates the cabin from the rest of the boat.

name: On a Fishing Boat

desc:
You are standing on the bow of a small boat that is probably capable of
ocean travel.  There is a roof over the stern of the boat, forming a room that
is obviously used to provide shelter during harsh weather.  A flap of thick
cloth acts as a door to the cabin.

exits.desc: A large flap of canvas separates the cabin from the rest of the boat.

name: The Bow of a Fishing Boat

desc:
You are mid-deck in a large ship, close to the bow.  This deck is used as
the main dining hall as well as the bar, dance floor, and sometimes as a bed.
To the north and east, the deck spreads out more.  To the south, there is a
door that has been barred shut from the other side.

exits.desc: This large room extends to the north.
This large room extends to the east.
The south door is barred shut from the other side.

name: The Mid-Deck
